question_text:
Linked List Cycle

Given `head`, the head of a linked list, determine if the linked list has a cycle in it.
input_format: Space-separated values as per problem arguments.
output_format: A single line representing the result.
explanation: We use Floyd's cycle-finding algorithm (tortoise and hare). If there's a cycle, the fast pointer will eventually catch up to the slow pointer inside the cycle. O(N) time and O(1) space.
